TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Zach_Appelman, title = Zach_Appelman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zach_Appelman} }

S.FORM: == Zach Appelman == kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 5, Zach Appelman, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
== Zach Appelman == kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 5, Zach Appelman, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == zaʦ~ʨħ appelman == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, zaʦ~ʨħ appelman, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
